acceptance_criteria: Returns correct following/followed_by state; blocking field reflects domain blocks; requested=true for pending follow requests; multiple IDs return array in same order as input
description: Return relationship status between the authed account and one or more other accounts. The id[] query param accepts multiple account IDs. Returns array of Relationship objects with: following, followed_by, blocking, muting, requested (follow request pending), endorsed, mute_notifications, show_reblogs, notifying, domain_blocking.
design: Relationship.id = account id string. Look up in follows, followers, domain_blocks tables. All boolean fields — default false if no row. requested: check follow_requests table for pending outbound follow.
title: GET /api/v1/accounts/relationships
